action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py failed with AttributeError on frame.convert (frames from render(..., return_type='pil') was nested list due to batch=1 scene_codes). Data inspection succeeded showing per-object cameras.json with varying azimuth/elev/dist; current render used fixed defaults (elev=0, dist=1.9) ignoring targets. No eval score yet. Analysis: TripoSR zero-shot is valid strong baseline for task (matches single-image->3D+render); must handle nested frames and incorporate avg target elev/dist from cameras.json (for n_views=11 orbit) to reduce pose mismatch and improve LPIPS. This follows workflow for quick pipeline validation + baseline. Decision: Update predict.py with frames fix + camera-aware rendering, test on 3 val objects (fast), then submit_eval on best.pt to obtain initial LPIPS and measure iter time before longer runs.
action.command: python predict.py --data_path /data/val --checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt --output /tmp/val_pred.json --num_objects 3 && echo "Test completed successfully"
